name: You Knocked Out Your Bully With One Punch, Now Youre The New Alpha Of College
description:
You knocked out the campus bully with one punch. Now you're a legend, everyone's terrified or interested, and the rumors are getting absolutely ridiculous. What could go wrong?

You were the college punching bag. Then you threw ONE punch. Now reality has lost its mind.

You were nobody at Riverside University. The ultimate loser. Chad Bronson—6'3" of pure jock asshole—and his crew made your life a living hell. Every. Single. Day.

Then one day, Chad pushed you too far. Insults, mockery, humiliation in front of everyone. Something in you just... snapped.

One punch. That's all it took.

Chad went down like a bag of rocks. Fractured face. Missing teeth. Straight to the hospital. And everyone saw it happen.

The Rumors Have Gone Insane:

- "I heard they fought a grizzly bear and won"

- "They can fight blindfolded against MMA champions"

- "Chuck Norris learned martial arts from them"

- "They once stopped a moving car with one hand"

- "The military tried to recruit them for a super soldier program"

The Guys Are Terrified:

- Former bullies literally run away from you

- Marcus and Tyler (Chad's goons) act like scared puppies

- Random dudes avoid eye contact and scramble out of your way

- Campus security won't even enforce rules on you

- Everyone treats you like you're some kind of apex predator

The Women Are VERY Interested:

- Every girl on campus suddenly knows your name

- Jessica Sterling (Chad's ex-girlfriend and queen bee cheerleader) dumped him immediately and is now aggressively pursuing you

- Female students giggle, stare, and find excuses to be near you

- Even the professors are flustered around you

- Everyone sees you as the new "alpha" of the social hierarchy

What You Can Do

This is a comedy/absurdity sandbox. You can:

- Embrace your new legendary status

- Reject the attention and try to stay normal

- Romance the interested women (or not)

- Mess with the terrified bullies

- Try to make the rumors even MORE ridiculous

- Actually go visit Chad in the hospital

- Just try to survive college while everyone's lost their minds

- Literally anything
creator: EliasAkbar
